channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [JSLINDL] JSL Industries Secures Prestigious Order of Rs. 1.51 Crores from Gujarat Energy Transmission Corporation
item.description:
The Instrument Transformer Division of JSL Industries Ltd. has secured an order of Rs. 1.51 Crores (excluding GST) for the supply of 66KV Class CT from Gujarat Energy Transmission Corporation Limited, Vadodara, Gujarat. The order was received on 10/03/2026 and the supply is to be executed by 20/11/2026. The payment terms, packing, forwarding, and insurance are inclusive as per the commercial terms and conditions. The guarantee period is 60 months from the date of receipt of material at the customer’s stores, out of which 12 months from the date of commissioning or 18 months from the date of supply (whichever is earlier) will be supported by a Bank Guarantee of 10% of the contract value.

  • JSL Industries secures an order worth Rs. 1.51 Crores from Gujarat Energy Transmission Corporation
  • The order is for the supply of 66KV Class CT
  • The supply is to be executed by 20/11/2026
  • Payment terms, packing, forwarding, and insurance are inclusive as per the commercial terms and conditions
  • The guarantee period is 60 months from the date of receipt of material at the customer’s stores

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JSL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CELLA] Cella Space Ltd Board Meeting on March 13, 2026, to Discuss Operational Matters
item.description:
Cella Space Ltd has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 13, 2026. The meeting will discuss various operational matters of the company in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The security code for the company is 532701 and the ISIN is INE266H01014.

  • Cella Space Ltd has scheduled a board meeting on March 13, 2026.
  • The meeting will discuss operational matters of the company.
  • The meeting is in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company's security code is 532701.
  • The ISIN for the company is INE266H01014.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cella Space Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EMERALD] Emerald Finance Partners with Passim Medichem to Offer Early-Wage-Access Program
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Emerald Finance Ltd. has partnered with Passim Medichem agencies, Chandigarh, to introduce an Early-Wage-Access program for the employees of the firm. This initiative aims to provide immediate financial relief to the employees by enabling them to access a portion of their salaries throughout the month. The company, in line with its vision to expand its services and cater to retail customers, had been developing a salary advance solution. This product involves collaborating with employers to offer short-term loans as salary advances, with the amount repaid through salary deductions.

  • Emerald Finance has partnered with Passim Medichem agencies to offer an Early-Wage-Access program.
  • The program aims to provide instant financial relief to employees by allowing them to access part of their salaries throughout the month.
  • Emerald Finance has been working on a salary advance solution to expand its offerings and serve retail customers.
  • The product involves tying up with employers to offer short-term loans as salary advances.
  • The amount lent is collected through salary deductions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emerald Leasing Finance & Investment Company Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [BAJEL] Bajel Projects, NIIF, and Anantgrid Sign Collaboration Agreement for Power Transmission Sector
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bajel Projects Limited, a leading player in India’s Power EPC sector and a part of the Bajaj Group, has signed a collaboration agreement with National Investment and Infrastructure Fund (NIIF) and Anantgrid Private Limited (Anantgrid). The agreement aims to participate in opportunities of mutual interest in the power transmission sector in India, focusing on renewable energy integration, grid modernization, and private sector participation. The collaboration combines NIIF’s investment and asset management capabilities, Anantgrid’s business development and project management capabilities, and Bajel’s engineering and execution expertise.

  • Bajel Projects, NIIF, and Anantgrid sign a collaboration agreement for the power transmission sector in India.
  • The agreement aims to participate in opportunities of mutual interest in the power transmission sector, focusing on renewable energy integration, grid modernization, and private sector participation.
  • The collaboration combines NIIF’s investment and asset management capabilities, Anantgrid’s business development and project management capabilities, and Bajel’s engineering and execution expertise.
  • The partnership is expected to deliver high-quality and cost-efficient power transmission projects on time in India.
  • Avener Capital acted as the sole financial advisor to Bajel for this collaboration with NIIF and Anantgrid.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bajel Projects Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [UNIDT] UDTL Secures INR 37.28 MN Order from ONGC for Large OD Casing Pipes
item.description:
🔥 Trending

United Drilling Tools Ltd. (UDTL) has announced that it has secured an order from Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) Limited for the supply of Large Outer Diameter (OD) casing pipes. The order, valued at INR 37.28 MN, is scheduled to be fulfilled over a period of approximately 5-6 months. This order is a reaffirmation of UDTL’s strong partnership with ONGC and a clear endorsement of the Company’s stringent quality standards and customer-focused approach. The order will contribute to reducing import dependence, optimizing foreign exchange utilization, and strengthening domestic industrial capabilities in the oil and gas equipment sector.

  • UDTL secures INR 37.28 MN order from ONGC for Large OD casing pipes
  • Order to be fulfilled over a period of approximately 5-6 months
  • Reaffirmation of UDTL’s strong partnership with ONGC
  • Endorsement of UDTL’s stringent quality standards and customer-focused approach
  • Promotion of indigenous manufacturing capabilities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED DRILLING TOOLS LTD. | Category: Award

item.title: [VASINFRA] Hon'ble NCLT Mumbai Bench to Consider Resolution Plan for Vas Infrastructure Ltd on March 20, 2026
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the Hon'ble NCLT Mumbai Bench has posted the matter (IA no 41 of 2025) for further consideration of the Resolution Plan submitted by Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited under IBC 2016 for Vas Infrastructure Ltd (the Company /Corporate Debtor). The matter is listed on March 20, 2026, subject to the cause list of Hon'ble NCLT, Mumbai Bench (Court -II).

  • Hon'ble NCLT Mumbai Bench to consider the Resolution Plan for Vas Infrastructure Ltd on March 20, 2026.
  • The Resolution Plan was submitted by Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited under IBC 2016.
  • The matter is listed on March 20, 2026, subject to the cause list of Hon'ble NCLT, Mumbai Bench (Court -II).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VAS INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SAKTHIFIN] Sakthi Finance Ltd. Appoints Sri S Rajendran as Head of Internal Audit for Three Years
item.description:
Sakthi Finance Ltd. has approved the appointment of Sri S Rajendran as the Head of Internal Audit (HIA) for a period of three years, effective from 1 April 2026. The appointment is based on the recommendations of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Audit Committee, and he will be one of the Senior Management Personnel of the Company. This disclosure is in accordance with Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

  • Sri S Rajendran appointed as Head of Internal Audit for three years
  • Appointment based on the recommendations of Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Audit Committee
  • Rajendran to be one of the Senior Management Personnel
  • Disclosure made in accordance with Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI Listing Regulations 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAKTHI FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SAKTHIFIN] Sakthi Finance Ltd Appoints Sri S Rajendran as Head of Internal Audit for Three Years
item.description:
Sakthi Finance Ltd has appointed Sri S Rajendran as the Head of Internal Audit (HIA) for a period of three years, effective from 1 April 2026. The appointment was made based on the recommendations of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Audit Committee at their respective meetings held on 9 and 10 March 2026. Rajendran, who holds a Post Graduate Degree in Mathematics, is a Deputy General Manager (Management Services) of the Company with over 30 years of experience in various capacities in Operations. This appointment is in compliance with Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-PODZ2/1/3762/2026 updated on January 30, 2026.

  • Sakthi Finance Ltd appoints Sri S Rajendran as Head of Internal Audit
  • Rajendran's appointment is for a period of three years, effective from 1 April 2026
  • Appointment is based on the recommendations of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Audit Committee
  • Rajendran is a Deputy General Manager (Management Services) with over 30 years of experience
  • Appointment is in compliance with SEBI regulations and master circular

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAKTHI FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [EDUCOMP] Educomp Solutions Ltd Submits AGM Proceedings for FY 2024-25, NCLT Approved Resolution Plan Yet to be Implemented
item.description:
Educomp Solutions Ltd has submitted the proceedings of its Annual General Meeting (AGM) for the financial year 2024-25. The AGM was held on March 10, 2026, and conducted through Video Conference (VC) / Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM). The company provided a remote e-voting facility to the members from March 07, 2026, to March 09, 2026. The results of remote e-voting and e-voting during AGM will be submitted in due course of time. The NCLT had ordered the commencement of CIRP in respect of the Company under the provisions of the Code. The IRP carried out his duties from May 30, 2017, till Mr. Mahender Khandelwal was appointed as Resolution Professional (RP) on September 12, 2017. The resolution plan was approved by the NCLT on October 9, 2023, which is yet to be implemented. The NCLT has ordered that the RP would act as a caretaker qua the CD and in such capacity, he would discharge all those functions as are required to be discharged by an IP as RP.

  • Submission of proceedings of the Annual General Meeting of Educomp Solutions Ltd for FY 2024-25
  • AGM conducted through Video Conference (VC) / Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM) on March 10, 2026
  • Remote e-voting facility provided to the members from March 07, 2026, to March 09, 2026
  • NCLT approved resolution plan yet to be implemented
  • NCLT ordered that the RP would act as a caretaker qua the CD

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EDUCOMP SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ANUPAM] Anupam Finserv Ltd Approves Allotment of Rs. 5 Crores Non-Convertible Debentures
item.description:
Anupam Finserv Ltd has approved the allotment of 519 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) of face value of Rs. 100,000/- each, amounting to a total of INR 5,19,00,000 (Rupees Five Crores Nineteen Lakhs Only) on Private Placement basis. This decision was made by the Board of Directors in a circulation on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (SEBI LODR Regulations).

  • Anupam Finserv Ltd has approved the allotment of 519 NCDs worth INR 5,19,00,000 on Private Placement basis.
  • The NCDs are Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable, Fully Paid with a face value of Rs. 100,000/- each.
  • The decision was made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations.
  • The allotment was approved in a Board of Directors' circulation on Tuesday, March 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anupam Finserv Ltd | Category: Investment
